title: Name/secure the Licence/terms + Educator reviewers (blocking gate roles)
context: OER are abundant and free but are not indexed against the curriculum standards that govern what teachers must teach, so teachers cannot find the free resource aligned to a given standard. This project builds an open crosswalk of educator-reviewed AlignmentRecords linking OER to standards by stable identifier (CASE GUID / ASN URI), not by reproducing copyrighted standards text. Two hard gates never skip: the dual licence/terms gate (gate-002) and educator review of every record, with a blind second-reviewer precision audit holding precision at >= 95%. The educator review and licence/terms gates are blocking; this task secures the named humans who fill them.
objective: Name and secure the Licence/terms reviewer and Educator reviewer(s), plus the independent auditor for the precision audit.
acceptanceCriteria: A named Licence/terms reviewer who can read CC/OGL/CCSS/ACARA terms and apply ncpolicy-003.
At least one named Educator reviewer per in-scope subject + grade band, qualification recorded; a second-reviewer/auditor identified for the precision audit.
Until filled, all tasks stay verifiedNeed:false and no record can pass review; roles recorded in the PLAN governance section.
Output licensed CC-BY-4.0; the commit is DCO signed-off.
